div1.entryFree:
Brawn, 1) a fleshy mass: the b. buttock, All's II, 2, 19. that damned b. shall play Dame Mortimer, H4A II, 4, 123.*Harry Monmouth's b., the hulk Sir John, H4B I, 1, 19.
2) the musculous arm: and in my vantbrace put this withered b., Troil. I, 3, 297. to hew thy target from thy b. Cor. IV, 5, 126. the --s of Hercules, Cymb. IV, 2, 311.
